creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
POV: You finally visited Dubai’s famous Raining Street! ☔️

This is definitely the highlight of our anniversary getaway at @voco_monacodubai. It rains every 15 minutes for 2 minutes. Not just a drizzle, but a complete downpour! 😅 So even though we brought an umbrella, we ended up soaking wet… but it was super fun! 

PS Thanks to Islam of La Brasserie for handing over beach towels after seeing us drenched in the rain. We really appreciate the kind gesture. 🤗❤️

#RainInDubai • Raining Street • The World Islands • Dubai Destinations• Lady and her Sweet Escapes

transcription.text: Release your inhibitions Feel the rain on your skin No one else can feel it for you Only you can let it in
